sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, values) AS sorted_values FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, values || [10, 12, 9]) AS sorted_concat FROM test_arrays;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id UInt32, number_field Float64);
SELECT a.id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, arrayMap(x -> toInt32(x), values)) || toString(b.number_field) AS combined FROM test_arrays AS a JOIN test_numbers AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT a.id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, values) AS sorted_vals FROM test_arrays AS a WHERE a.id IN (SELECT id FROM test_numbers WHERE number_field IS NOT NULL);
SELECT a.id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, (SELECT values FROM test_arrays WHERE id = a.id)) AS sorted_subquery FROM test_arrays AS a;
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, values) AS partial_sorted FROM test_arrays GROUP BY id HAVING length(values) > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, str_field String);
SELECT a.id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, arrayMap(x -> length(x), [str_field || 's']), 2) AS length_sorted FROM test_strings AS a;
SELECT a.id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, values || arrayMap(x -> x * 2, (SELECT number_field FROM test_numbers WHERE id = a.id))) AS combined_reversed FROM test_arrays AS a;
SELECT a.id, arrayPartialReverseSort(2, values) || (SELECT min(number_field) FROM test_numbers WHERE id = a.id) AS sorted_min FROM test_arrays AS a;
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(1, arrayConcat(values, [NULL])) AS single_sorted_nullable FROM test_arrays;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_numbers WHERE number_field IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arrayPartialReverseSort(2, arrayMap(x -> x || ' appended', [toString(b.str_field) FROM test_strings AS b])) AS appended_sort FROM temp_table;
